title: schilleria rudis
intro: Schilleria rudis is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the spurge family. The medicinal properties of Schilleria rudis lie in its sap, which has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Schilleria rudis include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infection. Herbal preparations of Schilleria rudis can be made into a paste or infusion, which can be applied topically to affected areas or consumed as a tea to reap its medicinal benefits.
